TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ernie Barrett nalecuhan i Pratt, Kansas, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Ernie Barrett i 1951 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 7, namapili' tu nu Boston Celtics putiput. 8 bulad 27 demiad, 1929 a mihca, Ernie Barrett, miunduay.
S.PHON: ərniə barrətt nar~ɾəʦuħan i pratt, kansas, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. ərniə barrətt i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu boston ʦər~ɾtiʦs putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ərniə barrətt, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Ernie Barrett nalecuhan i Pratt, Kansas, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. Ernie Barrett i 1951 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 1 ku uwac atu silsil 7, namapili' tu nu Boston Celtics putiput. 8 bulad 27 demiad, 1929 a mihca, Ernie Barrett, miunduay.
S.PHON: ərniə barrətt nar~ɾəʦuħan i pratt, kansas, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. ərniə barrətt i **** a miħʦan nba sapapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ mimar~ɾiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwaʦ atu sir~ɾsir~ɾ *, namapir~ɾiʔ~ʡ tu nu boston ʦər~ɾtiʦs putiput. * bur~ɾad ** dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, ərniə barrətt, miunduaj.
